transcript.text: Hello, Bhavya ji! Main Priya bol rahi hoon, Imagicaa Theme Park se. Aapne recently 25 April 2026 ke liye tickets cart mein add kiye the — 3 Adult, 1 Child ke liye. Booking complete nahi hui thi, toh socha ek baar remind kar doon. Koi problem thi kya?
Haan, total ₹6996 ka amount ho raha tha. Kya price ko lekar koi concern hai?
Achcha, theek hai. Main aapko 10% ka discount offer kar sakti hoon. Usse aapki booking ₹6296 ki ho jaegi. Kya main apply kar doon?
Theek hai, maine 10% ka discount apply kar diya hai. Aapko revised booking link SMS pe mil gaya hoga. Aap wahan se complete kar sakte hain.
